metadata.description: Compass — build true to spec, with zero drift. A contract-first build lifecycle (define → review → plan → review → build → review) where a locked contract is the invariant every step is checked against.

plugins.name: compass
plugins.description: Contract-first build lifecycle: define a locked contract, turn it into an engineering plan, build it, with three adversarial reviews (contract, plan, build) and zero drift from the agreed spec. Elegant user-driven gates and clean cross-session handoff.
